creator: bmc@WillsCreek.COM
text:
Enclosed is an update to the `tgif' port, to bring it up to date
	with the latest version (4.1.1) of the tgif software distribution.

Fix: Enclosed is the result of a "diff -uNr tgif-4.0.18 tgif-4.1.1'.
	Apply this recursive patch to bring the port up-to-date.
How-To-Repeat: 
	N/A
